target_flow: Send and read messages in Grok desktop app (via WebCatalog)

sidebar_variants.collapsed: More Tabs needed — collapsed sidebar icons are in Tab order. May need 5-8 Tabs.

recommended_approach: Use Escape first to reset focus. Then Tab repeatedly. After each Tab, the agent should check: did the Attach button highlight? If yes, one more Tab reaches input. The Attach button appearing is the landmark — input is always the next Tab stop after Attach.

navigation_plan.note: Bring window to front without resizing
Invoke Attach via ExpandCollapsePattern. This anchors focus at the input area regardless of sidebar state.
ONE Tab from Attach always reaches the input field
Type one character to activate the cursor (Grok requires this)
Use the /set-clipboard endpoint to set clipboard text. This handles clearing and setting in one call.
Verify text appeared in input before sending
Click the last Copy button to copy Grok's response to clipboard. Returns clipboardText with full response.

known_issues: Tab count depends on sidebar state — expanded (2 Tabs) vs collapsed (5-8 Tabs)
The Attach button is the LANDMARK — input is always the next Tab stop after Attach highlights
Input field requires a keystroke to activate cursor before paste works
SendKeys strips spaces in Grok — must use clipboard paste
Ctrl+A selects nothing in Grok chat area — /copy returns empty, screenshot is required for reading responses
VERIFIED: /copy returns empty text on Grok (2026-03-22) — Ctrl+A does not work in Grok's WebCatalog wrapper
Set-Clipboard via cmd.exe does not affect desktop session — must use runPSRawInteractive
WebCatalog wrapper adds extra Electron chrome around Grok
